design.title: Design Implementation
design.body: You have the designs. I make them real in Shopify — pixel-perfect, exactly as your designer intended. No interpretation, no shortcuts.

features.title: Features & Integrations
features.body: When the Shopify app store isn't enough. I build custom features, connect third-party tools, and make your store work the way your business actually works.
